ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was last revised */,
  "obsolescence_date" TEXT /* Date when the component becomes obsolete */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's datasheet */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., DIP, SOIC, BGA) */,
  "pin_count" INTEGER /* Number of pins on the component */,
  "operating_voltage_min" REAL /* Minimum operating voltage */,
  "operating_voltage_max" REAL /* Maximum operating voltage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "min_delay" REAL /* Minimum delay from last register to pad */,
  "max_delay" REAL /* Maximum delay from last register to pad */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the delay */,
  "typical_delay" REAL /* Typical delay from last register to pad */,
  "jitter" REAL /* Jitter in the timing specification */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range for which the timing specification is valid */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the timing was tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_specs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_specs" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "typical_power" REAL /* Typical power consumption */,
  "max_power" REAL /* Maximum power consumption */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the power */,
  "standby_power" REAL /* Power consumption in standby mode */,
  "active_power" REAL /* Power consumption in active mode */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range for which the power specification is valid */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the power was tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_specs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thermal_specs" (
  "thermal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thermal specification */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the specification belongs to */,
  "typical_temp" REAL /* Typical operating temperature */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the temperature */,
  "thermal_resistance" REAL /* Thermal resistance of the component */,
  "heat_sink_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if a heat sink is required */,
  "temperature_range" TEXT /* Temperature range for which the thermal specification is valid */,
  "test_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the thermal characteristics were tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thermal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thermal_specs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supply_chain" (
  "supply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supply chain entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the supply chain entry belongs to */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor supplying the component */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for component delivery */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Unit cost of the component */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the unit cost */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity from the vendor */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity from the vendor */,
  "inventory_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for inventory replenishment */,
  "vendor_contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person at the vendor */,
  "vendor_contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email at the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supply_chain_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designs" (
  "design_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each design */,
  "design_name" TEXT /* Name of the design */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer responsible for the design */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the design */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the design */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the design */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the design (e.g., In Progress, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the design */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "design_components" (
  "design_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association between design and component */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the design */,
  "component_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the component used in the design */,
  "alternative_component_id" INTEGER /* ID of an alternative component that can be used if the primary one is unavailable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("design_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_alternative_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("alternative_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_design_components_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "designer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the designer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the designer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the designer */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the designer was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing" (
  "manufacture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing process */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design being manufactured */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the design is manufactured */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manufacturing process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manufacturing process */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield percentage of the manufacturing process */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number for the manufacturing process */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line used for manufacturing */,
  "quality_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality manager responsible for the manufacturing process */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the manufacturing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_quality_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("quality_manager_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility manager */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control process */,
  "manufacture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturing process being quality controlled */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality control process was performed */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the quality control process */,
  "defects" TEXT /* Description of defects found */,
  "qc_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quality control manager */,
  "test_equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used for testing */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the quality control process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_manufacture_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacture_id") REFERENCES manufacturing ("manufacture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_qc_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("qc_manager_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "design_id" INTEGER /* ID of the design */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the design in inventory */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the inventory is stored */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "next_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the next inventory check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_design_id FOREIGN KEY ("design_id") REFERENCES designs ("design_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse manager */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES designers ("designer_id")
)
